summary.coverage_notes: All critical paths covered. Gaps: MCP live integration not run, 'Reconnect now' button (missing feature), date range chip UI (not implemented in this cycle)

performance.notes: REST query latency measured from integration test timings (largest observed: 51ms). WS broadcast test passed well within 500ms timeout.

owasp_checks.notes: LOCALHOST_ORIGINS set enforced on WS upgrade; all non-localhost origins return 403
No sensitive data stored; UUIDs generated via crypto.randomUUID()
All query params validated before use; cursor decoded and structurally validated; filenames derived from UTC date only
Fire-and-forget pattern ensures mutations cannot be blocked; connection cap prevents resource exhaustion
Missing HTTP security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options) on REST endpoints — pre-existing codebase pattern, not new to this feature
Reuses existing ws package already in use for terminal — no new dependencies
No auth required — consistent with Prism's single-user localhost model

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.notes: JSONL append is atomic for writes < PIPE_BUF; no deserialization of user-controlled objects

owasp_checks.category: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
owasp_checks.notes: Structured JSON logs emitted for all connection events, broadcasts, errors, and cleanup operations
No outbound requests made by the activity subsystem

test_cases.description: task.created event logged + queryable via REST
test_cases.notes: Backend test: activity.test.js

test_cases.description: type filter returns only matching events

test_cases.notes: Server-side pagination works correctly; UI layer does not use cursor (BUG-001)
Well within 500ms SLA

test_cases.description: useActivityFeed — addActivityEvent called on activity message
useActivityFeed — backoff resets after successful open
ActivityFeedPanel — empty state when no events

test_cases.description: ActivityFeedPanel — type filter hides non-matching events
ActivityFeedPanel — Load more button disabled while loading

test_cases.description: ActivityFeedToggle — badge hidden when panel open
Non-localhost origin rejected on WS upgrade
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: LOCALHOST_ORIGINS.has(origin) check present, socket.write 403 + destroy on miss
Static analysis: activeConnections >= MAX_CONNECTIONS check present
Static analysis: maxPayload: MAX_PAYLOAD = 8192 in WebSocketServer options
Integration test: invalid cursor returns 400
Integration test: limit=9999 returns 400
Static analysis: new Date(fromParam) + isNaN check present

test_cases.description: REST activity query SLA < 100ms p95 for limit 50
test_cases.notes: Highest observed integration test: 51ms (space/rename/delete test). Well within 100ms SLA
Static analysis: toggleActivityPanel and setActivityPanelOpen both set activityUnreadCount=0 on open

test_cases.description: terminal.js upgrade handler passes non-terminal paths
test_cases.notes: Static analysis + code review: terminal.js line 482 returns early without destroy for non-/ws/terminal paths

test_cases.description: Load more uses cursor for pagination
test_cases.notes: BUG-001: nextCursor from API response is discarded; loadActivityHistory always calls without cursor

test_cases.description: Panel resize min=240px, max=800px per spec
test_cases.notes: BUG-002: ActivityFeedPanel uses minWidth=280, maxWidth=600; user story spec says min=240, max=800

test_cases.description: loadActivityHistory queries global endpoint on first load
test_cases.notes: BUG-003: activeSpaceId defaults to 'default' so the global branch is never reached; always space-scoped
BUG-004: ACTIVITY_OPEN_KEY='activity-panel:open'; user story spec says 'prism:activity-panel-open'
BUG-005: label is 'Toggle activity feed, N unread'; spec says 'Activity feed, N unread events'
